details.featuresDescription: Everything you need for a high-performance website.

creation.heroTitle: Websites that feel clearer, more credible, and better executed
creation.heroDescription: Landing pages, showcase websites, and business sites designed to present an activity with more clarity, trust, and visual discipline.
creation.longDescription:
A good website is not just about 'being online'. It should help people understand what you do quickly, trust the business behind it, and feel a real sense of seriousness.

My approach focuses on structure, rhythm, hierarchy, and execution details to create a presence that feels sharper, more credible, and easier to grow over time.

includes.title: Page structure
includes.description: Landing page, showcase site, or business website with a clear architecture that can evolve cleanly over time.

includes.title: Responsive design
includes.description: An interface designed from the start to stay readable, coherent, and pleasant on both mobile and desktop.

includes.title: Contact flow
includes.description: Calls to action, forms, and entry points placed with more intention, without cluttering the experience.

includes.title: Clean technical base
includes.description: A serious front-end implementation that performs well and gives the project room to evolve later.

approach.title: Clarity before showmanship
approach.description: I focus on understandable, well-structured, and credible pages before adding effects or unnecessary complexity.

approach.title: Design that supports the substance
approach.description: Visual work should improve quality perception, but also help make the offer and the structure easier to read.

approach.title: A foundation that can grow
approach.description: Even a simple site should be able to expand cleanly into more content, more pages, or more specific tools later on.

fitGood: you have a real business but your online presence still feels too weak or too generic
you need a more credible website to present your services or company
you want something cleaner and more serious without going through a heavy agency process
you want a strong base before adding e-commerce, SEO, or custom tools later
fitNot: you only need a temporary page with no real quality or perception stakes
you already need a highly complex product platform from version one
the main need is not the website itself but already a very specific internal tool

seo.title: Website design & development | Kalissea
seo.description: Showcase websites, landing pages, and business sites built with clarity, visual care, and clean front-end execution.

creation.ctaDescription: I can help you build a presence that feels clearer, more credible, and easier to evolve.

ecommerce.heroTitle: Stores that are simple, trustworthy, and pleasant to browse
ecommerce.heroDescription: For small brands and businesses that need an online store that feels clearer, more reassuring, and easier to buy from.
ecommerce.longDescription:
An online store does not need to be huge to be effective. It mostly needs to make the catalog easy to understand, the buying flow easy to follow, and the whole experience credible enough to encourage a purchase.

I focus on smaller-scale e-commerce work, with particular attention to clarity, trust, and mobile experience.

includes.title: Catalog and collections
includes.description: Structure for categories, product pages, and collections that makes the offer easier to browse.

includes.title: Buying flow
includes.description: A smoother path between discovery, product page, cart, and checkout.

includes.title: Mobile commerce
includes.description: A store designed to stay simple to browse and reassuring to use on a phone.

includes.title: A workable foundation
includes.description: A structure that can absorb new products, new pages, and later adjustments without becoming messy.

approach.title: Useful simplicity
approach.description: I try to remove unnecessary friction rather than multiply effects or features for their own sake.

approach.title: Trust first
approach.description: Design, structure, and tone need to support confidence at the moment buying decisions are made.

approach.title: Built for smaller teams
approach.description: I shape these stores around real needs of smaller businesses, not around an oversized e-commerce stack.

fitGood: you sell a small to medium catalog and want a cleaner store
you need to present products better without making the experience heavier
you want a store that feels credible, clear, and maintainable
your priority is a better buying experience before adding advanced custom features
fitNot: you need a huge catalog with marketplace logic or heavy ERP complexity
you are looking for an enterprise e-commerce platform from day one
the main issue is still branding or acquisition rather than the store itself

seo.title: E-commerce website design | Kalissea
seo.description: Online stores for smaller businesses with clearer buying flows, stronger trust, and better overall usability.

ecommerce.ctaDescription: I can help you design an online store that feels simpler, more reassuring, and more aligned with your business.

maintenance.heroTitle: Your peace of mind, our priority
maintenance.heroDescription: Focus on your business, we'll take care of the rest. Guaranteed security, updates, and performance.
maintenance.longDescription:
A website isn't a finished product; it's a living organism that requires constant care to remain performant and secure against changing web threats.

Our preventive and corrective maintenance service ensures your work tool is always operational. We monitor your site 24/7, apply security patches even before you know a vulnerability exists, and regularly optimize the database to maintain optimal loading speed.

benefits.title: Maximum Security
benefits.description: 24/7 monitoring and protection against intrusions and malware.

benefits.title: Daily Backups
benefits.description: Never lose your data. We back up your site every day.

benefits.title: Priority Support
benefits.description: A question? A change? Our team is there for you in a click.

features.title: Automatic Updates
features.description: Weekly updates for security and performance.

features.title: Cloud Backups
features.description: Encrypted backups stored on external server.

features.title: Monthly Report
features.description: Detailed PDF of actions performed and site status.

features.title: Fast Restoration
features.description: Site restoration in case of crash in less than 1h.

faq.question: What happens if my site is hacked?
faq.answer: If you are under a maintenance contract, we clean and restore your site for free and immediately.

faq.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.answer: Yes, our plans are non-binding. You are free.

faq.question: Does the plan include edits?
faq.answer: Business and Premium plans include hours of small content changes (text, images).

seo.title: Website Maintenance & Security | Kalissea
seo.description: Web maintenance contracts for WordPress and Next.js. Security, backups, updates, and priority support. Sleep easy.

maintenance.ctaDescription: Choose the maintenance plan that suits you and sleep soundly.

seo.heroDescription: For projects that need to be better structured, faster, and easier to understand for both users and search engines.
seo.longDescription:
I do not approach SEO as a magical promise or a race for hacks. For smaller businesses, the most useful work often starts with cleaning up the foundations: page structure, readability, markup, speed, and better-organized content.

It is more a discipline of clarification and optimization than a performance fantasy.

includes.title: On-page structure
includes.description: Titles, sections, hierarchy, and page organization that make reading and understanding easier.

includes.title: Core performance work
includes.description: Useful improvements to page weight, media handling, and overall loading experience.

includes.title: Metadata and markup
includes.description: Setup or cleanup of the elements that help a site be understood and presented more clearly.

includes.title: Measurement and tracking
includes.description: Analytics, usage tracking, and simple checkpoints to understand what actually improves.

approach.title: SEO as an extension of clarity
approach.description: I start from structure and content understanding before talking about growth or rankings.

approach.title: Realistic optimization
approach.description: I focus on what makes sense for the level of the project and for the resources behind it.

approach.title: No artificial promises
approach.description: The goal is to build cleaner, more readable, and more durable foundations, not to oversell instant results.

fitGood: the site already exists but still feels poorly structured or hard to read
you need a serious SEO base before investing further
you want to improve speed, structure, and overall understanding of the site
you are looking for useful and sober optimization, not miracle-growth marketing
fitNot: you expect large-scale link building or a highly industrial SEO operation
you still do not have a clear website base to optimize
your main issue is much more about branding or product than optimization

seo.title: SEO & website optimization | Kalissea
seo.description: SEO foundations, content structure, performance, and clarity for websites that need to be cleaner and easier to understand.

seo.ctaDescription: I can help you bring more order to the structure, speed, and readability of your site.

branding.heroTitle: Visual direction that feels sharper, more coherent, and more intentional
branding.heroDescription: When interface, tone, and structure move together, the perceived quality of a project changes immediately.
branding.longDescription:
I do not treat visual direction as a decorative layer added at the end. It helps shape atmosphere, clarify hierarchy, and give the project a stronger and more coherent overall perception.

That is often what makes something move from merely functional to genuinely credible.

includes.title: Visual hierarchy
includes.description: Work on contrast, rhythm, readability, and emphasis so the most important parts stand out naturally.

includes.title: Typography choices
includes.description: Careful font selection and use to reinforce both personality and overall discipline.

includes.title: Interface direction
includes.description: Color, density, detail, and visual language shaped consistently across the whole site.

includes.title: Brand / product alignment
includes.description: A stronger link between what the project does and how it appears on screen.

approach.title: Less decoration, more discipline
approach.description: I look for a direction that gives character without creating noise or unnecessary effects.

approach.title: Design as structure
approach.description: Visual work should help people understand the project, feel intention, and perceive a higher level of quality.

approach.title: Consistency over time
approach.description: The goal is not a one-off visual hit, but a digital presence that stays right and credible over time.

fitGood: the project works but still lacks personality or visual discipline
you feel a gap between your real level and the image you currently project online
you want a more refined interface without doing a full rebrand
you need stronger coherence between content, product, and visual perception
fitNot: you only need a standalone logo with no interface or structural work around it
the project priority is purely technical or operational in the very short term
the main need is an internal tool with almost no perception stakes

seo.title: Visual direction & interface identity | Kalissea
seo.description: Visual direction, hierarchy, typography, and interface coherence for a more credible digital presence.

branding.ctaTitle: Does the project still lack visual discipline?
branding.ctaDescription: I can help you shape a direction that feels more coherent, more refined, and more credible.

automation.heroTitle: Custom tools and automations shaped around real operational needs
automation.heroDescription: When a project goes beyond a simple website, I can also design workflows, dashboards, portals, or internal interfaces that support everyday operations more directly.
automation.longDescription:
Not every business needs a full CRM or a heavy internal application. But many benefit from simpler tools built around an actual workflow, a recurring friction point, or a very specific need.

That is where I tend to be most useful: somewhere between the standard website and the more tailored internal system, with a sober and progressive approach.

includes.title: Workflows and automations
includes.description: Simple business automations that remove repetitive tasks or improve an important handoff in the process.

includes.title: Dashboards and tracking
includes.description: Tracking interfaces, synthesis views, or lightweight operational tools adapted to the way you work.

includes.title: Portals and dedicated spaces
includes.description: Client areas, restricted access, internal interfaces, or intermediate tools between website and back-office.

includes.title: Tailored logic
includes.description: A structure built around the actual need instead of forcing a too-large generic product.

approach.title: Need first, technology second
approach.description: I prefer to identify the real operational problem before labeling it CRM, AI, or anything else too early.

approach.title: Build smaller, but build right
approach.description: The right solution is often lighter than expected, as long as it is well scoped and clearly designed.

approach.title: Leave room to extend later
approach.description: Even a simple tool should still be able to grow if usage proves it and the need expands.

fitGood: you need a simple tool to track, centralize, or streamline part of your operations
a standard website is no longer enough for the way the business actually works day to day
you need a dashboard, portal, booking flow, or more tailored business logic
you want something more specific than a generic SaaS without building a full platform
fitNot: you already need a very large software product with a dedicated product team
the real need is still too unclear to know what should be built
an existing market tool already solves the problem well without any real need for customization

seo.title: Custom tools & automation | Kalissea
seo.description: Workflows, dashboards, portals, and internal tools designed around concrete operational needs.

automation.ctaDescription: I can help you define and build a tool that fits your way of working more closely.

details.approachTitle: How I tend to approach it
details.fitDescription: Not every business needs the same level of tooling or complexity. The goal is to build the right thing, at the right time, with the right scope.

brief.title: Chat
brief.description: 10 min on WhatsApp to understand your trade and service area.

design.title: Creation
design.description: I create your site, your logo if needed, and optimize your Google presence.

development.title: Approval
development.description: You approve the result. We adjust until it's perfect.

delivery.title: Launch
delivery.description: Your site goes live. You start receiving calls.

followup.title: Support
followup.description: 30 days of support. I stay available on WhatsApp.
